---
title: ""
format: 
  revealjs: 
    height: 900
    slide-level: 3
    link-external-newwindow: true
    chalkboard: true
    controls: true
    auto-stretch: false
    code-overflow: wrap
tbl-colwidths: [50,50]
---

## [CHECK-IN : Is there a relationship between narcissism and age?](https://forms.gle/ukg3b16VfzdiRiJF6) {.smaller}

::::: columns
::: {.column width="60%"}
[**Link to Dataset**](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/p1yc5kvkckkwok2v19jl5/narcissism_data.csv?rlkey=y0zwtllmfsie447eybxa4965u&dl=0)

-   **score** = narcissism score (40-item scale)
-   **age** = Entered as a free response. Ages below 14 have been ommited from the dataset.
-   **sex** = Chosen from a drop down list (1=male, 2=female, 3=other; 0=none was chosen).
:::

::: {.column width="40%"}
![](images/clipboard-3435010172.png)
:::
:::::

### Check-In Spoilers

:::{.r-fit-text}

::::::::: panel-tabset
### variables

-   **score** = narcissism score (40-item scale)
-   **age** = Entered as a free response. Ages below 14 have been ommited from the dataset.
-   **sex** = Chosen from a drop down list (1=male, 2=female, 3=other; 0=none was chosen).

### read.csv()

```{r}
#| echo: true
d <- read.csv("~/Dropbox/!WHY STATS/Chapter Datasets/Narcissism Data/narcissism_data.csv", stringsAsFactors = T)
head(d)
```

### hist()

```{r}
#| echo: true
par(mfrow = c(1,2))
hist(d$score)
hist(d$age)
```

### hist()

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4
d$age[d$age > 100 | d$age < 14] # outliers
d$age[d$age > 100 | d$age < 14] <- NA # they gone.
par(mfrow = c(1,2))
hist(d$score)
hist(d$age)
```

### lm()

::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Defining the Model**

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 5
plot(d$score ~ d$age)
mod <- lm(d$score ~ d$age)
abline(mod, lwd = 5)
```
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Interpreting The Model**

```{r}
#| echo: true
coef(mod)
summary(mod)$r.squared
```

**Professor Notes Go Here.**

```{=html}
<textarea rows="4" cols="50">
Type your text here...
</textarea>
```
:::
:::::

### scale()

::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Defining the Model**

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 5
plot(scale(d$score) ~ scale(d$age))
modZ <- lm(scale(d$score) ~ scale(d$age))
abline(modZ, lwd = 5)
```
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Interpreting The Model**

```{r}
#| echo: true

round(coef(modZ), 2)
summary(modZ)$r.squared
```

**Professor Notes Go Here.**

```{=html}
<textarea rows="4" cols="50">
Type your text here...
</textarea>
```
:::
:::::
:::::::::

:::

## Question : Is there a relationship between gender and narcissism?

See Prof. R script and demo.

## THE END.

![](https://www.gif-vif.com/trending/frog-dance-frog.gif.pagespeed.ce.P7TEOgyG1P.gif){fig-align="center"}
